burst.msg_body: Sequential read of variable length has been inferred
Sequential read of variable length has been inferred
Sequential write of variable length has been inferred
Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 8 in loop 'readA' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 8 in loop 'readB' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem1'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of variable length and bit width 16 in loop 'writeC' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem2'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
